---
title: "Modules"
sidebar: modules
toc: false
---

DAFce ships **10 modules** organized in independent packages. Each module has its own search path — add only what you need.

| Module | Package | Description |
|--------|---------|-------------|
| [Application](application.qmd) | `Daf.Application` | `IDafApplication` builder and runner |
| [Commons](commons.qmd) | `Daf.Commons` | Smart pointers, RTTI, threading, arrays, CLI parser |
| [Configuration](configuration.qmd) | `Daf.Configuration` | JSON / env / in-memory config, typed binding |
| [DependencyInjection](di.qmd) | `Daf.DependencyInjection` | Full DI container with scopes and lifetimes |
| [Hosting](hosting.qmd) | `Daf.Hosting` | `IHost` / `IHostBuilder` lifecycle model |
| [Logging](logging.qmd) | `Daf.Logging` | Structured logging with scopes |
| [MediatR](mediator.qmd) | `Daf.MediatR` | CQRS: commands, queries, notifications, pipelines |
| [MiniSpec](minispec.qmd) | `Daf.MiniSpec` | BDD testing: Gherkin specs, expectations, live dashboard |
| [NNLog](nnlog.qmd) | `Daf.NNLog` | NLog-inspired logging engine integrated with DAF |
| [Web](web.qmd) | `Daf.Web` | Lightweight HTTP server and routing |

Modules marked with **Abstractions** also ship a `Daf.X.Abstractions` package containing only interfaces, for cleaner compile-time dependencies.
